# Robots.txt for AcceleratorX
# Guide search engine crawlers on which pages to index and which to avoid.

User-agent: *

# Allow search engines to crawl all main pages
Allow: /
Allow: /courses/

# Disallow sensitive or administrative pages
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /blogs/dashboard
Disallow: /blogs/manage
Disallow: /api/

# Disallow unnecessary query parameters
Disallow: /*?session=
Disallow: /*?sort=

# Specify the location of the sitemap
Sitemap: https://acceleratorx.org/sitemap.xml
